hero.tagline: Bitsocial is <openSource>an open-source</openSource> <p2p>peer-to-peer network</p2p> <socialApps>for social apps</socialApps>, with <noServers>no servers</noServers>, <noBans>no global bans</noBans>, where users and communities are <crypto>cryptographic property</crypto>.

footer.tagline: Open Source P2P Network for Social Apps
